title: What will Trump's new design of the East Potomac Golf Links look like?
shortDescription: The historic East Potomac Golf Links may soon look very different under a Trump-backed redesign aimed at reviving the course and surrounding parkland.

title: What is the 'Thucydides Trap?' Trump blames Biden after Xi's warning
shortDescription: President Trump blamed Joe Biden for making the U.S. "a nation in decline" after Chinese President Xi Jinping warned of the "Thucydides Trap."

title: ATF Trump-era change leads to fewer gun dealer licenses revoked | The Excerpt
shortDescription: The ATF revoked fewer gun dealer licenses in 2025. Is it fairer enforcement, or a weakening of oversight?

title: Pa. Gov. Shapiro sharpens re‑election message around first‑term record
shortDescription: In his bid for a second term, Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro talked about first-term accomplishments as his opponent has highlighted controversies.

title: 'He would like to see it end', Trump says of Xi on Iran war
shortDescription: The president struck a cautiously optimistic tone from Beijing, though it’s unclear if he’ll walk away with any formal guarantees of assistance.

title: Democrats are losing on redistricting. Here are their last, best hopes
shortDescription: On the heels of a stinging gerrymandering loss, three Virginia Democrats told USA TODAY they're still optimistic about their party's midterm chances.

title: Satirical video game critiques war, Donald Trump
shortDescription: An anonymous art protest group installed "Operation Epic Furious: Strait To Hell," a satirical anti-war video game, at the DC War Memorial.

title: Sharp exchanges dominate California governor debate as voters decide
shortDescription: A heated California governor debate spotlighted divides on crime, abortion and elections as a wide‑open primary race heads into its final stretch.

title: Abbott wants a Texas statewide prosecutor, impeachable district attorneys
shortDescription: Gov. Greg Abbott on Thursday unveiled a four-point public safety plan for the 2027 Texas Legislature, including a new statewide prosecutor's office.

title: Florida Lawmaker Roars Into Bullhorn to Protest Redistricting Vote
shortDescription: Angie Nixon marched up and ​down the aisle with a bullhorn on April 29, protesting redistricting. Credit: Florida House via Storyful

title: Senators vote to pause their own pay during shutdowns
shortDescription: The Senate voted to pause senators pay during government shutdowns in a rare bipartisan move aimed at shared sacrifice.
